working_on: Infrastructure-misfire sweep — Session α (foundations) per approved plan. Doc drift sweep across README/ROADMAP/ADR README indices; cascade-discipline ops doc + ADR 0041; soft-warn lifecycle ops doc + ADR 0042 + lifecycle integration; gate-on-the-gate amendment to ADR 0040 with S-0028 case study; engine/tools/health_check.py per ADR 0038 three-layer contract; three new validator soft-warn checks; engine-side cross-references doc; CLAUDE.md context-budget recalibration. Phase 4 gate exercise (originally queued at S-0029 per STATE.md) re-queues to S-0030.
outcome_summary: Infrastructure-misfire sweep landed in 10 sequential commits closing 8 user-flagged misfires plus 2 adjacent issues. (1) Doc drift sweep cleared README/ROADMAP/two ADR README indices of stale ADR-narration and pre-S-0024 phase pointers; product/adr/README re-points project-total ADR claim to engine/STATE.md to avoid future drift. (2) ADR 0041 + cascade-discipline.md commit cascade-analysis discipline composed of three soft-warn validator checks plus manual procedures. (3) ADR 0042 + soft-warn-lifecycle.md move trend canon from gitignored validate-history.jsonl to committed engine/session/archive/S-NNNN.json field outcome_summary_soft_warns; boot-time persistent-warn surface (3-of-5 archives) at /start-engine; 10-consecutive escalation criterion. (4) ADR 0040 Consequences amended with gate-on-the-gate citation+cold-review pass; build-readiness-gate.md gains step 7 (citation) and step 8 (cold-review) with S-0028's four mid-build divergences as worked examples. (5) docs/health-checks/ scaffolding (README + TEMPLATE) at repo root. (6) engine/tools/health_check.py end-to-end per ADR 0038 three-layer contract: contract-first prose, ruff + ruff-format + mypy --strict clean, 45 pytest tests passing; closes ADR 0022 deliverable promise; CLI --session [--dry-run]; reads committed sources only (does NOT query MemPalace per documented non-responsibility). (7) Three new soft-warn validator checks (validate_superseded_adr_currency, validate_adr_back_reference_orphan with Orphan-OK suppression, validate_adr_consequences_deliverable_audit with both repo-root and ADR-directory path resolution); 14 new pytest tests; total 115 passing; surfaced 1 real finding (ADR 0022's pre-partition path references) which was resolved in same session via deliverable-handshake amendment. (8) engine/operations/cross-references.md authored as engine companion to product/docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md. (9) CLAUDE.md Budget guidance recalibrated for 1M window with explicit thresholds + four worked examples + no-preemptive-split rule. Cold-review pass via Explore subagent on the four touched Python files (health_check.py + test_health_check.py + validate.py extensions + test_validate.py extensions): all four match contract; no premise drift detected. Validator post-session: 14 checks, 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Pre-commit gate stack clean across all 10 commits. ADR count post-S-0029: 42 total — 40 Accepted + 2 Superseded, partitioned 9 engine + 33 product. STATE.md re-points S-0030 at the Phase 4 build-readiness gate exercise (re-queued from S-0029); first health-check cadence trigger fires at S-0031 boot (last_claimed = S-0030 → 30 % 30 = 0).
